title: Smart Commit: Distributed model artifacts
original_text: Generated the official local ML model artifacts after installing python3-sklearn from Debian repositories. The training command wrote ml/commit_model.pkl, ml/vectorizer.pkl, and ml/model_metadata.json so the distributed predictor can load without retraining.
expected_body_lines: - Train the local sklearn model with Debian packages
- Write official commit_model.pkl and vectorizer.pkl artifacts
- Validate that the distributed predictor loads without retraining
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(ml): generate distributed model artifacts"
